name: Magic Lemon Pie (Crs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly mix the crust ingredients and pack them into a nine-inch pie pan. Bake at 375 degrees for 10 minutes, then let cool.
2. Reduce oven temperature to 325 degrees.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine condensed milk, lemon juice, lemon zest, and egg yolks. Stir until the mixture thickens.
4. Pour the mixture into the cooled crust.
5. Add cream of tartar to the egg whites and beat until almost stiff.
6. Gradually add sugar while beating until the meringue is stiff and glossy but not dry.
7. Pile the meringue lightly on top of the pie filling.
8. Bake at 325 degrees for about 15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
9. Let cool thoroughly before serving. Enjoy!
Hint: Try to achieve an even crust thickness that is not too thick.
